user.title: Navien NaviLink
user.description: Sign in with your NaviLink mobile app credentials.

pick_gateway.title: Select gateway
pick_gateway.description: Choose the NaviLink gateway to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Navien NaviLink
reauth_confirm.description: Your NaviLink credentials are no longer valid. Enter them again.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Navien NaviLink
reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for this NaviLink gateway.

reconfigure_pick.title: Confirm gateway
reconfigure_pick.description: Confirm the gateway for this entry.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Check your username and password.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The selected gateway does not match this entry. Pick the same gateway, or add it as a new integration.

command_failed.message: Failed to send the command to the water heater. Check the connection and try again.

temp_out_of_range.message: Target temperature {temp} is outside the allowed range {min}–{max}.

unsupported_model.title: Unsupported Navien model
unsupported_model.description: This NaviLink unit type ({unit_type}) is not recognised. Basic controls may work, but some entities could be missing or incorrect. Please open an issue with your model number so support can be added.
